title: World Not Found...
description: A horror modpack made for "The Broken Script"
body:
![World Not Found](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ab091b3457aa205b4ad2546b2ccb5785f1cd909_0.webp)
----
**This modpack enhances The Broken Script mod with an eerie and nostalgic look. You can even play with your friends. It's best to avoid making too many changes to the settings. PLEASE READ MORE ABOUT [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script) BEFORE PLAYING**

-------

To access "The Broken Script" config use /tbs_config To remove all banning events use /safemode command

------

### Mods:
- [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/versions)
- [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium)
- [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)
- [Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus)

### Support Mods:
- [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

### Shaders & Resource packs:
- [Rudimentary](https://modrinth.com/shader/rudimentary-ps1)
